summary: Tested comment reply functionality (nested comments). Backend API 100% working (9/9 tests pass). Frontend code review shows correct implementation. Reply feature requires: 1) User must be logged in, 2) Comments must be expanded via 'View all comments' button.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend API for replies is fully functional - POST /api/posts/{post_id}/comments with parent_id creates nested replies
GET /api/posts/{post_id}/comments returns nested replies in 'replies' array with reply_count field
Frontend CommentWithReaction component (PostCard.js lines 102-341) correctly implements Reply button toggle and submission
Reply button has data-testid='reply-btn-{comment.id}' for testing
Reply input appears when Reply button clicked (showReplyInput state toggle)
handleSubmitReply correctly sends POST with { content, parent_id: comment.id }
User must be logged in to reply - shows 'Please log in to reply' toast if not authenticated
Comments must be expanded via 'View all comments' button to see Reply buttons (recent_comments inline view doesn't show Reply)
seed_data_creation: Created test comments and replies during testing (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Comment reply feature is working correctly. Backend API tested with 9 passing tests. Frontend implementation verified via code review. Key points: 1) Reply button only visible when comments are expanded (click 'View all comments'), 2) User must be logged in to reply, 3) Reply input toggles on Reply button click, 4) Submit creates nested comment with parent_id. If user reports issue, verify they are logged in and have expanded comments.

endpoints_tested.GET /api/posts/{post_id}/comments: PASS - Returns nested replies in 'replies' array

features: showReplyInput state toggles reply input visibility
handleSubmitReply sends POST with content and parent_id
localReplies state updated after successful reply
Reply button has data-testid for testing
Disabled state when empty or submitting
user object passed to PostCard from useAuth context
